name: customer_id
description: Reference to the customer who placed the order

name: status
description: Order status: pending | confirmed | shipped | delivered | cancelled

name: total_amount
description: Total order value including taxes and shipping

name: currency
description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. USD GBP INR)

name: item_count
description: Number of line items in the order

name: created_at
description: UTC timestamp when the order was created

name: updated_at
description: UTC timestamp of the last status update

name: shipped_at
description: UTC timestamp when the order was shipped

name: delivery_address
description: Full delivery address as a single string

name: is_gift
description: True if the order is marked as a gift
